generatePrinciplesMd.signature: generatePrinciplesMd(principlesData: Array<{category: string, statement: string, rationale: string}>): string
generatePrinciplesMd.description: Returns markdown content for .planning/PRINCIPLES.md from structured principles data

generateClaudeMdSection.signature: generateClaudeMdSection(principlesData: Array<{category: string, statement: string}>): string
generateClaudeMdSection.description: Returns a compact summary (10-15 lines max) suitable for appending to CLAUDE.md with a pointer to the full PRINCIPLES.md

loadPrinciples.signature: loadPrinciples(cwd: string): Array<{category: string, statement: string, rationale: string}> | null
loadPrinciples.description: Reads and parses .planning/PRINCIPLES.md, returns null if file does not exist

specFlag.description: Optional spec file path argument for init that seeds research agents with prior findings

principlesAwareScopedClaudeMd.signature: generateScopedClaudeMd(cwd, setId, options) -- includes PRINCIPLES.md content in scoped output
principlesAwareScopedClaudeMd.description: Extended generateScopedClaudeMd() in worktree.cjs to include principles summary when PRINCIPLES.md exists

claudeMdTokenBudget.description: The CLAUDE.md principles summary must not exceed 15 lines to avoid agent context bloat

specCriticalEvaluation.description: When spec content is passed to research agents, it must be framed with 'evaluate critically' instruction and spec-derived assertions must be tagged with [FROM SPEC]

principlesOptional.description: All principles-related features must degrade gracefully when PRINCIPLES.md does not exist -- loadPrinciples() returns null, generateScopedClaudeMd() omits the section

definition.scope: Add --spec flag to /rapid:init for spec file integration mirroring the new-version pattern, implement meta-principles capture during init with new principles.cjs module, generate PRINCIPLES.md and inject summary into CLAUDE.md, and extend generateScopedClaudeMd() with principles awareness.

tasks.description: Create principles.cjs with generatePrinciplesMd(), generateClaudeMdSection(), loadPrinciples()
tasks.acceptance: Module generates valid PRINCIPLES.md and compact CLAUDE.md section (max 15 lines)

tasks.description: Add --spec flag to init SKILL.md with spec-aware discovery bypass and critical-evaluation framing
tasks.acceptance: Init with --spec extracts structured info from spec file; research agents receive spec with [FROM SPEC] tags

tasks.description: Add principles capture step to init SKILL.md after discovery confirmation
tasks.acceptance: Init flow includes principles interview with 'Use sensible defaults' escape hatch

tasks.description: Extend generateScopedClaudeMd() to include PRINCIPLES.md content when available
tasks.acceptance: Worktree-scoped CLAUDE.md includes principles summary; gracefully omits when no PRINCIPLES.md exists

tasks.description: Update research role modules to accept and critically evaluate spec content
tasks.acceptance: Research agents produce output that references spec assertions with [FROM SPEC] tags

acceptance: PRINCIPLES.md generated and CLAUDE.md summary injected
Scoped CLAUDE.md includes principles when available
